summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: Hero Battle Report 新增 HagiPower 趋势图表，并补充了对应报表内容的多语言文案。
summary.en: Change Summary: Added HagiPower directional charts to hero battle reports, with matching translation updates for the new report content.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

Hero Battle Report 新增 HagiPower 趋势图表

  • 变更说明: Hero Battle Report 新增 HagiPower 趋势图表，并补充了对应报表内容的多语言文案。
  • 影响范围: 影响 reports 相关功能、feature-home 相关功能、i18n 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

提案归档同步与 Profile Picker 相关流程

  • 变更说明: 优化提案归档同步与 Profile Picker 相关流程，让项目与会话变更之间的衔接更顺畅。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、Git 与仓库工具、应用服务。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

首页新增 Product Hunt 徽章卡片

  • 变更说明: 首页新增 Product Hunt 徽章卡片，完善对外展示内容。
  • 影响范围: 影响 feature-home 相关功能、应用服务、domain 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

项目 Git 快照的新鲜度与同步稳定性

  • 变更说明: 改进项目 Git 快照的新鲜度与同步稳定性，覆盖缓存、后台刷新、过期快照处理、启动预热，以及归档相关变更后的实时广播更新。
  • 影响范围: 影响 Git 与仓库工具、分布式会话运行时、handlers 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过现有的 Git 或仓库相关面板使用该能力，新增行为会直接出现在原有操作入口中。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

持久化 Claude provider 的会话 ID

  • 变更说明: 持久化 Claude provider 的会话 ID，改善会话恢复场景下的连续性。
  • 影响范围: 影响 claude 相关功能、会话流程、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

HagiPower directional charts

  • Change Summary: Added HagiPower directional charts to hero battle reports, with matching translation updates for the new report content.
  • Impact: Affects Reports, Feature Home, I18n.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Proposal archive sync

  • Change Summary: Improved proposal archive sync and profile picker flows, helping project and session changes stay more connected in everyday use.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, Git and repository tools, application services.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

The home experience

  • Change Summary: Updated the home experience with a new Product Hunt badge card.
  • Impact: Affects Feature Home, distributed session runtime, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing the home experience entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Project Git snapshot freshness

  • Change Summary: Improved project Git snapshot freshness with caching, background refresh, stale snapshot handling, startup warmup, and live update broadcasts after archive-related changes.
  • Impact: Affects Git and repository tools, distributed session runtime, Handlers.
  • How to Use: Open the Git or repository-related panels you already use; the new capability is surfaced inside those existing actions.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Persisted Claude provider session IDs

  • Change Summary: Added persisted Claude provider session IDs to better support session resume behavior.
  • Impact: Affects Claude, distributed session runtime, session workflows.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing persisted claude provider session ids entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
